abstract: This meetup is a key part of the Cognitive Frameworks Festival, uniting open-source community around the city in the week of June 5: http://festival.framework.foundation We have 5 talks for this amazing meetup, showcasing the vibrant ecosystem around Apache Spark. 3 main talks, 20 minute each: PySpark Beyond Shuffling -- Why it isn't Magic -- but also where there is some really cool magic Holden Karau -- Apache Spark Committer, Spark Technology Center, IBM Apache SystemML: State of the Project and Future PlansFrederick Reiss -- Chief Architect, Spark Technology Center, IBM PredictionIO Kenneth Chen -- Cofounder of PredictionIO and Senior PM on Einstein, Salesforce 2 Lightning talks, about 10min each: Hyperparameter Optimization -- when scikit-learn meets PySparkSven Hafeneger -- Software Engineer, IBM SparklyrJavier Luraschi -- RStudio
event_title: Spark, Watson and Einstein: Spark.TC, Salesforce and RStudio!
title: Spark, Watson and Einstein: Spark.TC, Salesforce and RStudio!
